Clone all NocoBase configuration and dat: Clone all NocoBase configuration and data into a new app
Backup — your whole app + ALL your data: Backup — your whole app + ALL your data (structure, UI, roles, workflows, data). For archiving or moving as-is.
Clone — the same app (structure, UI, rol: Clone — the same app (structure, UI, roles, workflows) WITHOUT data. A blank copy for a new install.
Reset to the safe default: only your tab: Reset to the safe default: only your tables selected, no data.
Presets pick your collections + the righ: Presets pick your collections + the right toggles. The target app needs the same NocoBase version & plugins.
“My collections” are the tables you crea: “My collections” are the tables you created. Plugin/System are defined by plugins & NocoBase; they are usually not cloned.
Export successful! The file is downloadi: Export successful! The file is downloading.
The source and target apps MUST be the s: The source and target apps MUST be the same NocoBase version (the flow-engine format changes between versions).
Import is an UPSERT — it does not delete: Import is an UPSERT — it does not delete existing data.
Run it on a blank (freshly installed) ap: Run it on a blank (freshly installed) app for the most accurate result.
Large app → set env REQUEST_BODY_LIMIT=5: Large app → set env REQUEST_BODY_LIMIT=50mb (default 10mb; a flow-engine bundle can exceed it).
File attachments / uploads are NOT clone: File attachments / uploads are NOT cloned.
After import you must Restart the app so: After import you must Restart the app so tables + UI load fully.
Writing schema + creating tables + loadi: Writing schema + creating tables + loading the UI. A large app can take 1–2 minutes.
Drag & drop a file or click to select: Drag & drop a file or click to select
Ran {{count}} steps OK. RESTART the app: Ran {{count}} steps OK. RESTART the app so the tables & UI appear fully.
{{count}} steps failed: {{steps}}. See t: {{count}} steps failed: {{steps}}. See the detail table below.
RESTART the app so the data tables and U: RESTART the app so the data tables and UI appear fully.
Some steps failed — see the detail below: Some steps failed — see the detail below. Tables/UI may be incomplete.
You will see a preview of what changes b: You will see a preview of what changes before anything is written.
{{newC}} new · {{existC}} already exist: {{newC}} new · {{existC}} already exist · {{skip}} columns will be skipped
Some columns already exist on this app u: Some columns already exist on this app under a different internal key, so the incoming version of those columns is SKIPPED (existing data is kept — nothing is deleted). New columns are still added.
No conflicts detected. New collections/c: No conflicts detected. New collections/columns are added; matching ones are updated.
Schema is off — the table below only con: Schema is off — the table below only controls DATA imported into tables that already exist on the target.
Deleting a collection drops its table, A: Deleting a collection drops its table, ALL its rows, and any relations pointing to it. It cannot be undone. Only your own collections are listed here (system & plugin tables are never deletable).
RESTART the app so the change is fully r: RESTART the app so the change is fully reflected.
This permanently deletes {{count}} colle: This permanently deletes {{count}} collection(s) and {{rows}} row(s).
Tables are dropped and relations pointin: Tables are dropped and relations pointing to them are removed. This cannot be undone.
